description_long: This is a vintage jar of Madam C.J. Walker's Cleansing Cream, featuring a cylindrical glass body with vertical ribbing on the sides and a metallic screw-on lid. The front label is a deep amber color with black text, prominently displaying the brand and product name, along with a portrait medallion. The back label provides product directions and benefits in smaller text, also on an amber background. The jar's body is mostly opaque white glass, with the labels adhered to the front and back. The metallic lid has a slightly domed, brushed finish, showing some wear and patina. The overall appearance is classic and utilitarian, with a strong historical and collectible aesthetic.
description: A vintage glass jar of Madam C.J. Walker's Cleansing Cream with amber labels and a metallic screw-on lid. The jar features ribbed white glass sides and detailed branding on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the amber label with 'Madam C.J. Walker's Cleansing Cream' and a portrait medallion, along with the metallic lid and ribbed white glass body.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the ribbed white glass surface with minimal label visibility, focusing on the jar's texture and cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: The back view displays the amber label with product directions and benefits, as well as the metallic lid and ribbed glass body.
description_view_3: This opposite side view again emphasizes the ribbed white glass, with the edge of the amber label just visible, and the metallic lid on top.
